# CWE-807: Reliance on Untrusted Inputs in a Security Decision (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-807-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

var blockedIPs = map[string]struct{}{"203.0.113.50": {}}

// Safe: uses RemoteAddr from the trusted connection rather than a spoofable header.
// Reverse proxies should normalize trusted client addresses at the edge.
func GateSensitiveAction(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	clientIP := r.RemoteAddr
	if clientIP == "" {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	if _, blocked := blockedIPs[clientIP]; blocked {
		http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
